rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a cultural matching theory for mass-customization interface structure and interface fluency, while the cited paper is a specialized methodological paper on paid-search text ad copy testing (paired comparisons/Elo + Bayesian VANISH). In the provided notes, there is no indication that the citing study uses or extends that method; the only linkage is a single DOI match with no contextual quote. This looks most like an incidental/background citation rather than substantive dependence.
